subject: Re: Happy New Year 2007 from Dubai
body:
congragulations

----- Original Message ----
From: Daniel Siad <photographtv.daniel@gmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Tuesday, January 2, 2007 8:40:42 PM
Subject: Happy New Year 2007 from Dubai

I would like to wish a happy New Year Jeffrey


I hope this year will  very  positive and will bring you a lots of love ,health,success , Happiness and prosperity.

I am starting very well ,working as business developer fashion related
project ,Organising the first Fashion Trad Fair (Pret a Porter and Haute Couture)in the United Emirates
Dubai will be the only country to have the exclusivity for the meddle
east ,north Africa and the Indian subcontinent.so I just secured my
dream .

this group is royal related group named :Al Ahli Group

we are opening also the largest oultletmall in the region:



http://www.dubaioutletmall.com/



I spoke highly about you and they would like to invite you to visit to
meet with his highness Shaikh Muhammad Al maktoum the prime minister
and vice president  of U.A.E and ruler of Dubai.

just let me know when you could  be available,and here You are My guest.



again I am sending you my warmest regards and happy New Year

-- 
Daniel  Amar Siad
PO Box :213982
Dubai U.A.E
00971502953492
www.fashionhdtv.com

daniel@fashionhdtv.com
